label: OpenAI loop v4 coverage anchors
hypothesis: A coverage-first instruction that anchors each requested decision dimension to direct citations will recover important adoption-risk evidence while preserving citation support on the partial-support slice.
rollbackReason: Reject if live generated evidence misses the adoption-risk coverage anchor, introduces unsupported claims, loses to the OpenAI baseline branch on the focused visible slice, or cannot be promoted with a complete matching visible case set.
